title: The Cast of ‘Independence Day’: Where Are They 30 Years Later?
summary: In honor of the sci-fi blockbuster’s 30th anniversary, THR checks in on the all-star cast, including Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum and Vivica A. Fox.

title: Tesla Delivers a Blowout Quarter, Crushing Wall Street Estimates
summary: Tesla delivered a much stronger-than-expected second quarter, reporting 480,126 vehicle deliveries, well ahead of Wall Street forecasts of roughly 406,600. The company also produced 451,758 vehicles during the period, signaling a meaningful improvement after a slow start to the year, according to C…

title: The U.S. Has More SMR Projects Than Its Four Closest Rivals Combined
summary: The U.S. is leading the world in small modular nuclear reactor (SMR) development with 28 siting announcements, as of 2026. This graphic, via Visual Capitalist's Cody Good, in partnership with the National Public Utilities Council, shows which countries are building the most SMRs. The U.S. Leads Glo…

title: Trump Administration Advances New California Oil Lease Plans
summary: The Bureau of Land Management is giving California another chance to weigh in on oil and gas leasing—whether the state wants it or not. On Thursday, the BLM opened a 30-day public scoping period for 50 federal oil and gas parcels covering roughly 36,000 acres across Kern, Kings, Fresno, and San Lui…

title: Yet another ‘quant tremor’ strikes systematic investors
summary: The garbage rally roils quantitative investment strategies

title: Argentina angered by prospect of oil boom in Falklands
summary: Islands’ first commercial production in 2028 would transform tiny fishing-dependent economy
